summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification completed from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected for this mixed inventory shard. Security-sensitive #56152 is routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are kept closed; the remaining open PRs are non-mutating keep classifications because merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked and closeout gates are not met.
